testcase.name: shouldFindDueTasks_whenScheduledTimeHasPassed

auto.commit.interval.ms = 5000 auto.include.jmx.reporter = true auto.offset.reset = earliest bootstrap.servers = [localhost:9092] check.crcs = true client.dns.lookup = use_all_dns_ips client.id = fetch.max.bytes = 52428800 fetch.max.wait.ms = 500 fetch.min.bytes = 1 group.id = task-scheduler-group group.instance.id = null group.protocol = classic group.remote.assignor = null = [] metrics.num.samples = 2 metrics.recording.level = INFO metrics.sample.window.ms = 30000 partition.assignment.strategy = [class org.apache.kafka.clients.consumer.RangeAssignor, class testcase.name: shouldSaveAndRetrieveTask
testcase.system-out: Hibernate: insert into tasks (created_at, description, max_retries, retry_count, scheduled_at, status, title, updated_at) values (?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?) returning id
